basic_details.job_title: Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Guest Faculty Computer Teacher Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Guest Faculty Computer Teacher (PGT) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 1 Guest Faculty Computer Teacher (PGT) vacancy has been announced through the Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Guest Faculty Computer Teacher (PGT) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years as on 01-07-2026. For Ex-Servicemen/Superannuated Govt. School teachers, the maximum age limit will be 65 years as on 01-07-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MSc (Computer Science/IT)/MCA OR ME/M.Tech (Computer Science/IT) OR B.Ed from NCTE recognized institution OR Three/Four year integrated B.Ed-M.Ed from NCTE recognized institution with at least 50% marks
qualification.details: MSc (Computer Science/IT) or MCA from a recognized institution with at least 50% Marks. ME/M.Tech (Computer Science/IT) from a recognized institution with at least 50% Marks. B.Ed from an NCTE recognized institution with at least 50% Marks. Three/Four year integrated B.Ed-M.Ed from an NCTE recognized institution with at least 50% Marks.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Guest Faculty Computer Teacher (PGT) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Guest Faculty Computer Teacher (PGT) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Guest Faculty Computer Teacher (PGT) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Guest Faculty Computer Teacher (PGT) Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: MSc (Computer Science/IT) or MCA from a recognized institution with at least 50% Marks. ME/M.Tech (Computer Science/IT) from a recognized institution with at least 50% Marks. B.Ed from an NCTE recognized institution with at least 50% Marks. Three/Four year integrated B.Ed-M.Ed from an NCTE recognized institution with at least 50% Marks.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years as on 01-07-2026. For Ex-Servicemen/Superannuated Govt. School teachers, the maximum age limit will be 65 years as on 01-07-2026.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Guest Faculty Computer Teacher (PGT) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya Guest Faculty Computer Teacher (PGT) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Guest Faculty Computer Teacher (PGT) post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Guest Faculty Computer Teacher (PGT) position is 20th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MSc (Computer Science/IT) or MCA, or ME/M.Tech (Computer Science/IT), or a B.Ed, or a three/four-year integrated B.Ed-M.Ed from a recognized institution with at least 50% marks.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for general candidates is 50 years as of 1st July 2026. Specific age relaxations are available for certain categories.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age relaxation for ex-servicemen or superannuated government school teachers?
faq.answer: Yes, for Ex-Servicemen and Superannuated Government School teachers, the maximum age limit is extended to 65 years as on 1st July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Guest Faculty Computer Teacher (PGT) position?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the Atal Awasiya Vidyalaya's official website, the link for which is provided in the "Important Links" section.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates should attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position for a Guest Faculty Computer Teacher (PGT). The terms and duration of the contract will be as per the organization's policy.
